name: The Curiosity
short_description: The protagonist Ken and his friend Jun have come to a certain mountain to visit a rumored ruin. What awaits them there is...
detailed_description:
The protagonist Ken and his friend Jun have come to a certain mountain to visit a rumored ruin.
What awaits them there is...

Game Contents

This game is a stealth horror game.
You control the protagonist Ken and explore the map.
Enemies will chase you by reacting to the light of the protagonist's flashlight and footsteps.
Use these effectively to defeat them.

Gameplay Video/Distribution Guidelines

You can publish and distribute gameplay videos without permission.
Credit notation is not required.

The developer is not responsible for any damage caused by publishing or distributing gameplay videos of this game.
These guidelines are subject to change.
